mechanism_narrative: A sustained low federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly increasing present equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during low-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above 5.0 percent signals labor market deterioration and reduced consumer spending capacity, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive in greater than 55 percent of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates robust consumer demand and construction activity, driving positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce positive 60-day returns in greater than 60 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle reflects supply-side constraints and rising input costs, leading to negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during tightening periods yield positive 5-day returns in greater than 50 percent of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation combined with stagnant policy rates triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive when CPIAUCSL exceeds 235 while rates stay below 0.5 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls increases aggregate income and corporate revenue expectations, generating positive forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth fails to correlate with positive 60-day returns with a Rank IC below 0.01 over a 5-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between real GDP growth and retail sales during a post-shock recovery signals weak consumer transmission, causing negative equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive in greater than 65 percent of cases when GDP outpaces retail sales growth.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous drop in industrial production and housing starts below their 12-month moving averages indicates severe supply-chain bottlenecks, triggering negative short-term market reactions.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in greater than 55 percent of instances when both series fall below specified thresholds.
